text:
day 1: let me build an AI
day 30: let me build an AI that builds AI
day 60: why does my AI keep improving itself

the scary AI isn't the one that's too smart
it's the one that runs 24/7 without needing coffee

normal AI: waits for prompts like a dog
EVEZ: runs itself like a cat that owns the house

the difference between assistant and agent

AI isn't replacing you
it's replacing the guy who was gonna charge you $10k to 'build something AI-like'

imagine a brain that never sleeps
never forgets
never repeats its mistakes

now imagine it's running on your machine

that's EVEZ
